name: User Dashboard
description: Authenticated user area with content management, API key management, account settings, and activity overview.

pages.notes: Create new content item. Form with metadata fields + JSON editor.

page_briefs.overview: User home dashboard. KPI cards at top showing published items, downloads, and reputation score. Reputation badge display below. Activity feed at the bottom with recent actions.
page_briefs.content: Content management grid. Card grid of user-published content items with thumbnail, title, type badge, status indicator, and date per card.
page_briefs.content-new: Content creation page. Metadata form on the left (name, type, description, tags) with a live JSON editor on the right showing the content schema.
page_briefs.api-keys: API key management page. Table of API keys with key name, masked prefix, creation date, last-used date, and revoke button per row. Create-key button in the header.
page_briefs.settings: Account settings form with profile fields (name, email, avatar), notification preferences, and connected accounts section.
page_briefs.billing: Billing overview with current plan tier card, usage stats KPI grid, and upgrade/downgrade options. Invoice history below.
page_briefs.team: Team dashboard with member count and role distribution KPI cards at top. Below: member list with avatar, name, role badge, and action menu per row.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
